steps.title: Locate the correct table cell
steps.content:
The question asks specifically for the estimated impact of invasive mongooses on threatened mammals. Find the mongooses row and the mammals column in the table. Their intersection gives the answer.
  • Choice A — '0.35.': 0.35 does not appear anywhere in the table. ✗
  • Choice B — '0.61.': 0.61 is the estimated impact of cats on threatened mammals, not mongooses. Wrong row. ✗
  • Choice C — '0.75.': 0.75 is exactly the value at the intersection of the mongooses row and the mammals column. ✓
  • Choice D — '0.52.': 0.52 is the estimated impact of cats on threatened reptiles. Wrong row and wrong column. ✗

steps.title: Verify the value matches the question
steps.content: The only value that corresponds to mongooses and mammals is 0.75. All other choices pull values from different rows or columns, or from values not present in the table at all. That matches choice C — C is correct.
